title: Stippled Mirage
description: Ce style se caractérise par ses dégradés oniriques et lumineux, fortement texturés par un bruit numérique dense qui crée une esthétique moderne à l'aérographe. Les formes sont entièrement définies par des variations de couleurs vibrantes et prismatiques ainsi que des transitions douces plutôt que par des contours, produisant une atmosphère éthérée et rayonnante.
description_en: This style is characterized by its dreamy, luminous gradients heavily textured with dense digital noise, creating a soft, modernized airbrush aesthetic. Forms are defined entirely by vibrant, prismatic color shifts and feathered transitions rather than linework, resulting in an ethereal, glowing atmosphere.
description_fr: Ce style se caractérise par ses dégradés oniriques et lumineux, fortement texturés par un bruit numérique dense qui crée une esthétique moderne à l'aérographe. Les formes sont entièrement définies par des variations de couleurs vibrantes et prismatiques ainsi que des transitions douces plutôt que par des contours, produisant une atmosphère éthérée et rayonnante.
prompt: A captivating digital illustration of {{subject}}, executed in a contemporary editorial style characterized by ultra-smooth, luminous gradients heavily overlaid with dense, uniform digital noise. The rendering technique mimics a modernized, ethereal airbrush aesthetic, where absolute zero linework or hard contouring is present. Instead, the {{subject}} is sculpted entirely through soft, feathered transitions of vibrant hues and stippled color shifts. The visual ecosystem is drenched in a dreamy, high-key palette, featuring {{primary_color}} as the dominant, glowing wash that seamlessly dissolves into deep, atmospheric pools of {{secondary_color}}. Highlights and focal points are punctuated by radiant, prismatic bleeds of {{accent_color}}, creating a neon-pastel hybrid luminosity. The lighting anatomy is highly diffuse and otherworldly, with light appearing to emanate from within the forms themselves, producing soft volumetric radiance, colored light leaks, and subtle optical flares. The texture is intensely tactile, resembling a fine, sand-like spray paint or a digital dissolve blending mode, unifying the entire composition under a cohesive, grainy film. The edges of the {{subject}} are soft and melting, blurring gently into the surrounding dreamlike spatial dynamics, creating a sense of weightlessness and introspective surrealism. The atmosphere is nostalgic, gentle, and psychedelic, with forms floating in a flat yet voluminous space. The artwork must be completely borderless, filling the entire canvas from corner to corner. Ensure the image is full bleed, edge-to-edge, with no borders, no frames, no white margins, and no canvas edges, occupying the absolute entire dedicated space., contemporary digital illustration, grainy gradient, digital noise, airbrush aesthetic, lineless art, stippled shading, prismatic glow, ethereal atmosphere, soft transitions, luminous colors, dreamlike surrealism, editorial art, color bleed, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame, no canvas, occupying entire space
prompt_removebg: A captivating digital illustration of {{subject}}, executed in a contemporary editorial style characterized by ultra-smooth, luminous gradients heavily overlaid with dense, uniform digital noise, composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. The rendering technique mimics a modernized, ethereal airbrush aesthetic, where absolute zero linework or hard contouring is present. Instead, the {{subject}} is sculpted entirely through soft, feathered transitions of vibrant hues and stippled color shifts. The visual ecosystem is drenched in a dreamy, high-key palette, featuring {{primary_color}} as the dominant, glowing wash that seamlessly dissolves into deep, atmospheric pools of {{secondary_color}}. Highlights and focal points are punctuated by radiant, prismatic bleeds of {{accent_color}}, creating a neon-pastel hybrid luminosity. The lighting anatomy is highly diffuse and otherworldly, with light appearing to emanate from within the forms themselves, producing soft volumetric radiance, colored light leaks, and subtle optical flares. The texture is intensely tactile, resembling a fine, sand-like spray paint or a digital dissolve blending mode, unifying the entire composition under a cohesive, grainy film. The edges of the {{subject}} are soft and melting, gently blurring and interacting directly with the flat {{background_color}} backdrop. Intentional overflow is explicitly allowed, where parts of the ethereal {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame, cropped naturally by the image boundaries to enhance the sense of floating scale. The atmosphere is nostalgic, gentle, and psychedelic, with forms floating in a flat yet voluminous space against the solid {{background_color}}. The grainy texture of the {{subject}} casts soft, diffuse, colored shadows that seamlessly blend into the {{background_color}}, anchoring the surreal elements while maintaining their weightless, introspective quality., contemporary digital illustration, grainy gradient, digital noise, airbrush aesthetic, lineless art, stippled shading, prismatic glow, ethereal atmosphere, soft transitions, luminous colors, dreamlike surrealism, editorial art, color bleed, solid background compositing, edge overflow
background_prompt: A purely atmospheric, dreamlike environment characterized by ultra-smooth, sweeping gradients heavily textured with uniform digital noise and sand-like stippling. The space is defined by soft, abstract geometric forms and undulating planes of light, bathed in a dominant, glowing wash of {{primary_color}}. Deep, ethereal shadows pool in {{secondary_color}}, while soft, prismatic light leaks and diffuse flares of {{accent_color}} illuminate the hazy, lineless expanse. The entire scene feels weightless, ethereal, and drenched in a nostalgic, glowing aura.
background_prompt_removebg: A purely atmospheric, dreamlike environment characterized by ultra-smooth, sweeping gradients heavily textured with uniform digital noise and sand-like stippling, rendered against a flat {{background_color}} surface. The space is defined by soft, abstract geometric forms and undulating planes of light, bathed in a dominant, glowing wash of {{primary_color}}. Deep, ethereal shadows pool in {{secondary_color}}, while soft, prismatic light leaks and diffuse flares of {{accent_color}} illuminate the hazy, lineless expanse. Floating in the foreground to create depth is a decorative, soft-edged geometric overlay frame that mimics the same grainy, airbrushed texture, casting diffuse colored shadows onto the clean {{background_color}} backdrop.
